channel.title: Unable to log into the Forum in Firefox via Google Account
channel.description: As the title says, when I click "Log In" on the latest version of Firefox in Pop!_OS (Ubuntu) 20.10, I get a "Login Error". The only way around it is to open a private window and log in from there. Before, the login was working perfectly on my computers (I've now tried on two). Also, I noticed *sometimes* logging in via the private window will log me in on the non-private one.

item.title: Unable to log into the Forum in Firefox via Google Account
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @david1 ,

Is this something happening on all the Browsers?

This forum uses the Discourse platform which is an open source project → https://www.discourse.org/
What you describe seems to be a bug in the platform. I encourage you to follow their CONTRIBUTNG guide to report this bug on their platform

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to log into the Forum in Firefox via Google Account

item.title: Unable to log into the Forum in Firefox via Google Account
item.dc:creator: david1
item.description:
As the title says, when I click “Log In” on the latest version of Firefox in Pop!_OS (Ubuntu) 20.10, I get a “Login Error”. The only way around it is to open a private window and log in from there. Before, the login was working perfectly on my computers (I’ve now tried on two). Also, I noticed sometimes logging in via the private window will log me in on the non-private one.

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to log into the Forum in Firefox via Google Account
